users.title: Team Management
users.description: Invite new team members to your store and manage their roles and permissions.
users.name: Name
users.noUsersMessage: This store doesn't have any users yet.

ownerInfo.title: Owner Permissions
ownerInfo.description: As an owner, you can manage all team members, change roles (including making other owners), and access all store functions. You can manage owners, managers, and employees.

managerInfo.title: Manager Permissions
managerInfo.description: As a manager, you can manage employees (activate/deactivate, remove from store), but cannot modify owners or other managers. Only owners can change roles.

errors.mustHaveOwner: There must always be at least one owner.

removeUser.title: Remove User from Store
removeUser.description: This will permanently remove {name} from {store}. They will lose all access to this store, lose their current role and permissions, and need to be re-invited if you want them back. Their user account will remain active for other stores.

resetPin.title: Reset Password for {name}
resetPin.description: This will generate a new password and send it to the employee by email. Their current password will no longer work.

unlockPassword.title: Unlock Password for {name}
unlockPassword.description: This will immediately unlock the employee's password and reset their failed attempts counter.
unlockPassword.lockedMessage: The account is currently locked due to failed password attempts

removeDialog.title: Remove User from Store
removeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this store? This will deactivate their access but won't delete their account.

addEmployee.title: Add New Employee
addEmployee.description: Create a new employee account with password authentication. Login credentials will be sent by email.

form.emailNote: Use test@example.com for testing. Real emails will receive login credentials.
form.usernameNote: Employee will use this username to log in

preview.loginNote: The employee can log in with their username and password

success.title: Employee Created Successfully!
success.description: {name} has been added to your store. Save these credentials and share them with the employee.

nextSteps.title: Next Steps:
nextSteps.loginTab: • The employee can log in with their username and password
nextSteps.resetPassword: • The password can be reset at any time from the team management page
nextSteps.permissions: • The employee can scan products and manage basic inventory

errors.fillFields: Please fill in all required fields
errors.usernameTaken: Username is already taken. Please choose a different one.

toast.created: Employee created successfully using server API!
toast.emailSkipped: Employee created! Email skipped for test address.
